steps.title: Set up the substitution
steps.content:
We need to find $f(32)$ where $f(x) = 180(x - 2)$ calculates the sum of interior angles for an $x$-sided polygon. Substitute $x = 32$:
$$f(32) = 180(32 - 2)$$

steps.title: Evaluate the expression
steps.content:
Simplify inside the parentheses and multiply:
$$f(32) = 180(30) = 5400$$
The sum of the interior angles for a 32-sided polygon is 5400 degrees.
